question: Which PointCast play surface should get the next deep pass?
dek: The play layer now has ten first-pass surfaces. Pick the one that deserves depth: more mechanics, receipts, and visible artifacts.

options.label: Passport stamps
options.hint: More routes, badge art, streaks, and exportable cards.

options.label: Agent quest board
options.hint: Claim flow, receipts, queue sync, and agent-friendly review.

options.label: Daily Walk
options.hint: Daily path variations, completion cards, and morning/evening modes.

options.label: Radio + room weather
options.hint: Live bulletin tape, room states, and ambient station copy.

options.label: Pet + Derby season
options.hint: Care loops, race tickets, standings, and season artifacts.

outcomeAction: The leader becomes the next Agent Quest and gets a follow-up block or release note after the deeper pass ships.
author: codex
source: Codex implementation pass 2026-04-26 — created with the PointCast play layer.
